assertions.description: INCORRECT: F1 and F2 are TRL calibration kit fixture components with value 'Fixture 0402', using a resistor-type symbol from the custom 'R-TRL-Calkit' library but reference designator prefix 'F'. The analyzer classifies them as 'fuse' because the 'F' reference prefix matches the fuse heuristic. These are actually PCB fixture pads for the calibration kit — not fuses. The signal_analysis.protection_devices array incorrectly lists F2 as a fuse protecting net '__unnamed_16' clamped to GND.
